emrg_triggers: Caller states they are from GNM Pressure Washing
Caller states they are calling regarding a Chevron gas station managed by GNM Pressure Washing
Caller states they are calling regarding an SOs gas station managed by GNM Pressure Washing

non_emrg_routing.notes: During business hours, Clara will transfer to Ben's secondary number if direct contact is requested. If the secondary number is not yet active, calls are forwarded to Clara only if Ben doesn't answer or declines. After hours, all non-emergency calls will be handled by Clara stating to call back next business day.

aft_hrs_flow: For non-emergency calls, Clara will inform callers that the business will get back to them on the next business day.
biz_hrs_flow: Clara will answer calls, provide service pricing information ($150 call out fee for first 30 min, $98/hr residential thereafter) if asked, and transfer calls to Ben's secondary number if direct contact is requested. Initial setup involves conditional forwarding to Clara if Ben doesn't answer or declines.
open_qs: What is the official company name for Ben's business?
What is Ben's primary business phone number (this number will be used for call forwarding to Clara and for SMS notifications)?
What is Ben's secondary phone number for all call transfers (both emergency and non-emergency)?
What is the company's full physical address?
What is the operating timezone for the business (IANA format, e.g., America/Los_Angeles)?
What are the full details (company name, address, primary contact name, phone, and email) for GNM Pressure Washing?
What is the desired timeout duration in seconds for call transfer attempts?
How many times should Clara attempt to retry a call transfer before providing a fail message?
What message should Clara play if a call transfer fails?
Are there any external systems (e.g., CRM, calendar, booking software) that Clara needs to integrate with?
notes: Ben has signed a 12-month agreement where the price remains the same after an initial 3-month term. Pavan is the dedicated point of contact for Ben. Clara is currently configured for testing and will be available today; Ben will receive details (agent number, dashboard link) via email after this call. A follow-up meeting is scheduled for Friday at 2:00 PM (local time) for 15-20 minutes to review test calls and dashboard features, with the goal to go live with Clara handling calls this weekend. Ben uses an Android device. Current setup for business hours: Calls are forwarded to Clara if Ben (the sole call taker) does not answer or declines. Future setup for business hours (once Ben's new personal number is active): Clara will be the first point of contact, and can transfer calls to Ben's new secondary number if a caller requests to speak directly to him. Clara will send email notifications to info@bendselectricsolutionsteam.com and SMS notifications to the main line for all new calls. After-hours emergency calls are handled only for 'GNM Pressure Washing' and the Chevron/SOs gas stations they manage. These calls will be patched through to Ben. Service call pricing: $150 call-out fee (covers first half-hour on site), then $98/hour for residential, billed in half-hour increments ($49/half-hour) after the initial call-out fee. Clara should only mention this pricing if asked by the caller.
